---
title: "All Plots - Paper 2 (Ideological Commitment Signaling)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    classoption: [a4paper, 12pt]
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(here)
here::i_am("results/plots/all_plots.qmd")
setwd(here::here())
```

---
title: "Image Gallery"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

# 1. List all PNG files in the current folder (or specify a subfolder like "images/")
img_files <- list.files(pattern = "*.png", full.names = TRUE)

# 2. Display them all at once
knitr::include_graphics(img_files)
```
